description: As part of a regular audit, an associate needs to scan a sample of items in an aisle to ensure the shelf price matches the price in the POS system.

nodes.task_description: Go to the assigned aisle and open the 'Price Audit' tool on a handheld device.

expected_outcome.expected: The associate is ready to begin the audit.

nodes.task_description: Scan the barcode on the shelf label for an item.

expected_outcome.expected: The device records the shelf price.

nodes.task_description: Scan the barcode on the product itself. The tool compares the shelf price to the system price and flags any mismatches.

expected_outcome.expected: The associate can identify and correct any pricing errors in real-time.
